communication_log.message: WO-CORE-QUALITY-DEPTH-PASS-001 created. 4-phase phased plan. Hard stops at phases 1 and 2. Header baseline: 343 missing, 1782 stale, 278 defined. Phase 1 targets orchestrator.ts:477 rawExports/exports mismatch.

Phase 1 complete. Fixed walkRawTsExports in relationship-extractor.ts to include interface_declaration and type_alias_declaration. Commit 6a28e62. graph-to-elements.ts ConversionOptions now correctly detected (no false staleness). 1495 tests passing.

Phase 2 complete. --source-headers --overwrite-headers flood applied to all src/ files. Deduped 171 files with duplicate header blocks. Restored header-generator.ts (stamp pass corrupted formatAsComments body). Before: missing=343, stale=1782, defined=278 (11.5%). After: missing=343, stale=1112, defined=956 (41% of src). Commit 74e178f. 1495 tests passing. HARD STOP — awaiting approval for Phase 3 (RAG audit, requires server at :52849).

Phase 3 BLOCKED. RAG server started at :52849 (pid 17700, healthy). rag-index run: status=failed — all 1071 chunks failed with 'Invalid OpenAI API key'. Existing index dimension mismatch (1536 vs 768). No working vector store. Phases 3-4 cannot execute. BLK-001 filed. Workorder status set to checkpoint_ready.

BLK-001 resolved: re-indexed with --provider ollama --reset. nomic-embed-text (768 dim). 1153 chunks indexed, 0 failed (1642 skipped: missing/stale headers). Phase 3: 8 RAG queries executed. Query 2 (header generator) top hit: src/semantic/header-generator.ts:164 at 70.7%. Query 5 (graph adapter) top hit: src/adapter/graph-to-elements.ts:143 at 70.2%. Phase 4: loop validated — trivial change to graph-to-elements.ts → populate → rag-index → re-query confirmed updated hits (file appeared at positions 1+2). Test change reverted. All 4 phases complete.

Workorder closed via /close-workorder. Audit PASS: cultural alignment PASS, dependency audit 0 vulns, tracking validator 14/14 PASS (pre-existing projects.json drift documented). Tracking fixes: workorders.json type quality→audit, sessions.json agent_domain→owner_domain, active-work.json double-Z fixed + WO row removed. 4 phases complete, 3 commits (6a28e62, 74e178f, 3416b19). Archive pending Step 14.
